title: Doc comments: LSP hover exposure
analysis:
Task 216 wires doc comment text (extracted by Task 215 in reify-syntax) into LSP hover responses. The hover infrastructure already exists in reify-lsp/src/hover.rs with a 4-level lookup: members → structures → fn/trait/enum → keywords. The AnalysisContext in analysis.rs already provides find_member_decl() returning MemberInfo and structure_names(). The changes needed are: (1) add a doc field to MemberInfo sourced from the parsed AST's ParamDecl.doc/LetDecl.doc, (2) add find_entity_doc() to look up doc comments on top-level declarations (Structure, Function, Trait, Enum), (3) modify compute_hover() to append doc text as a markdown paragraph after signatures for all entity types, and (4) add an integration test through InProcessLsp bridge. The parsed module already carries doc: Option<String> on all declaration types from Task 215, so this task is purely about plumbing those docs into hover responses.

Post-review addendum: Two blocking issues identified — (a) fragile relative path in m9_trait_conformance.rs tests (pre-existing from task 194, but flagged by reviewer), and (b) main advanced 17 commits during conflict resolution, requiring a fresh rebase.

steps.description: Write failing tests in analysis.rs: find_entity_doc_returns_doc_for_documented_structure, find_entity_doc_returns_none_for_undocumented, member_info_includes_doc_for_documented_param — these test doc retrieval from the analysis layer before hover consumes it

Add doc: Option<&'a str> field to MemberInfo in analysis.rs, populate it from parsed AST via find_parsed_member_span_and_doc(). Add find_entity_doc(name) method that searches parsed declarations (Structure, Function, Trait, Enum) for matching doc comment

Write failing tests in hover.rs for structure doc hover: hover_on_documented_structure_shows_doc (asserts markdown contains doc text), hover_on_undocumented_structure_no_doc_section (asserts no triple-newline artifacts)
In compute_hover() structure-name branch, call ctx.find_entity_doc(name) and append doc text as '\n\n{doc}' after the param/let/constraint summary line

Write failing tests in hover.rs for member doc hover: hover_on_documented_param_shows_doc, hover_on_documented_let_shows_doc, hover_on_undocumented_param_no_doc_section — verifying doc text appears after param/let signatures
In compute_hover() member-lookup branch, check info.doc and append '\n\n{doc}' to the markdown string after the code-fenced signature

Write failing tests in hover.rs for fn/trait/enum doc hover: hover_on_fn_name_shows_signature_and_doc, hover_on_fn_name_without_doc_shows_signature, hover_on_trait_name_shows_doc, hover_on_enum_name_shows_doc
In compute_hover() fn/trait/enum branches, call ctx.find_entity_doc(word) and append '\n\n{doc}' to each entity's hover markdown after the signature code block

Write edge case tests: hover_multiline_doc_renders_all_lines (multi-line /// comments joined), hover_doc_with_blank_line_paragraph (/// then blank ///), hover_on_documented_param_reference_in_expr_shows_doc (doc shown when hovering on usage, not just declaration)
Write integration test in in_process_bridge.rs: hover_on_documented_structure_shows_doc_via_bridge — full roundtrip through InProcessLsp verifying doc text appears in JSON hover response

Rebase task/216 onto current main (38 commits ahead). No file overlap detected — main did not modify any files in crates/reify-lsp/ or crates/reify-syntax/. Resolve any conflicts in tasks.json or other non-code files if they arise.
Run full test suite for reify-lsp crate after rebase to verify no regressions from main's changes (cargo test -p reify-lsp). Confirm all 10 prior steps' tests still pass against rebased code.

Fix fragile test paths in crates/reify-eval/tests/m9_trait_conformance.rs: (1) Add a module-level const EXAMPLE_PATH using concat!(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"), "/../../examples/m9_trait_conformance.ri") for compile-time resolution independent of working directory, (2) Replace all 8 occurrences of std::fs::read_to_string("../../examples/m9_trait_conformance.ri") with std::fs::read_to_string(EXAMPLE_PATH). This fixes the reviewer-flagged fragility where paths break under non-standard CWD (e.g. cargo test --manifest-path, CI).

Rebase task/216 onto current main (17 commits ahead since step-11 rebase). Main advanced during conflict resolution. No file overlap detected — main's 17 new commits are task-status auto-commits and unrelated crate changes. Resolve any conflicts in tasks.json if they arise.

Run full test suite after rebase: (1) cargo test -p reify-lsp to verify all LSP hover doc tests pass, (2) cargo test -p reify-eval --test m9_trait_conformance to verify the CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR fix works correctly. Confirm no regressions from the rebase.

design_decisions.decision: Doc comments are appended as a plain markdown paragraph after the code-fenced signature, separated by \n\n
design_decisions.rationale: Follows standard LSP conventions (e.g., rust-analyzer, TypeScript LSP) where signature appears in a code block and documentation follows as prose. Clean rendering in all editors.

design_decisions.decision: Doc text is accessed via parsed module, not compiled module
design_decisions.rationale: The compiler strips doc comments during compilation. The ParsedModule preserves them on StructureDef, FnDef, TraitDecl, EnumDecl, ParamDecl, and LetDecl. AnalysisContext already holds the parsed module, so no new data flow needed.

design_decisions.decision: No doc text when doc is None — no trailing whitespace or empty sections
design_decisions.rationale: Clean output for undocumented entities. Tests explicitly verify no trailing \n\n or triple-newlines when doc is absent.

design_decisions.decision: find_entity_doc returns first match across all declarations
design_decisions.rationale: Reify modules typically have unique top-level names. Linear scan through declarations is sufficient for the small declaration counts in typical files. Matches the existing pattern in structure_names() and member_names().

design_decisions.decision: Rebase (not merge) to resolve main advancement
design_decisions.rationale: Rebase produces a linear history suitable for fast-forward merge. No file overlap between main's new commits and this task's changes in crates/reify-lsp/ and crates/reify-syntax/, so rebase should be conflict-free on code files.

design_decisions.decision: Use CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR const for test fixture paths instead of runtime-relative paths
design_decisions.rationale: concat!(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"), ...) resolves at compile time to an absolute path anchored to the crate root, making tests robust against different working directories (CI, --manifest-path invocations). A single const eliminates duplication across 8 call sites.

reuse.how: Already builds ParsedModule which carries doc: Option<String> on all declaration types. Just need to expose doc in MemberInfo and add find_entity_doc().
Existing hover branches for members, structures, fn/trait/enum — append doc text at each branch point. No structural changes needed.
Existing test pattern: initialize → didOpen → hover request → assert JSON contents. Add one new test for doc hover.
Extracts markdown string from Hover result. Reuse for all new doc-hover tests.
StructureDef.doc, FnDef.doc, TraitDecl.doc, EnumDecl.doc, ParamDecl.doc, LetDecl.doc — all Option<String>, populated by tree-sitter parser's extract_doc_comment().
